claim_text: Winter wheat yields were 18% lower under no-tillage and 6% lower under reduced (rotary) tillage than under conventional moldboard plowing over 17 years in the North China Plain.

value.raw_value_text: The average winter wheat yields were 18% lower under no‐till and 6% lower under reduced tillage than underconventionalmoldboardplowingafter17years(from2001to2018).
value.text_value: Winter wheat yields were 18% lower under no-tillage and 6% lower under reduced (rotary) tillage than under conventional moldboard plowing over 17 years in the North China Plain.

provenance.evidence_text: The average winter wheat yields were 18% lower under no‐till and 6% lower under reduced tillage than underconventionalmoldboardplowingafter17years(from2001to2018).

agronomic_scope.management_system: winter wheat-summer maize double cropping, irrigated, North China Plain
